purpose: Fix subtotal-validation failures via vision re-read of source PNGs. Each correction was verified against the actual PNG; for OpEx-sign issues the validator does GP - OpEx_stored, which inverts when OpEx is stored as a negative number, so corrections recast OpEx to positive magnitude.

corrections.issue: Single-digit transposition in Total assets 2023. PNG shows 21,020,968 but stored value is 21,202,968 (the '202' and '020' are swapped). Liabilities + Equity (15,911,064 + 5,109,904 = 21,020,968) reconciles cleanly to the corrected total. Note: balance-sheet table actually appears in source PNG file p101 (printed page 97), but is registered under page_id p095 in the extraction.

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG row 'Total assets' shows 21,020,968 in 2023 column; sum of Current 5,910,895 + Fixed 9,492,391 + Other 5,617,682 = 21,020,968

corrections.issue: Validator picks up 'Total shareholders' equity' (213,027) as the equity figure, missing 'Total net assets' which is the proper equity total inclusive of accumulated OCI, share acquisition rights and non-controlling interests. Adding a canonical 'Total equity' metric resolves the gap. Also, several stored values disagree with PNG (Total assets 258,182 vs PNG 258,180; Total liabilities 38,067 vs PNG 38,071; Total Net assets 220,114 vs PNG 220,109).

metric_additions.evidence: Equals 'Total net assets' on PNG (Japanese GAAP equity-equivalent line; reconciles 38,071 + 220,109 = 258,180)

corrections.issue: Same root cause as FY2018: validator uses 'Total shareholders' equity' (220,039) instead of 'Total net assets'. Stored Total assets 274,525 vs PNG 274,325; Total liabilities 47,438 vs PNG 47,435; Total Net assets 226,919 vs PNG 226,890.

Equity sub-items were extracted as truncated/abbreviated values (Common Stock=17,296 instead of 15,996,475; Total Equity=425,184 instead of 374,205,358), and several asset/liability lines were also wrong. Total Liab+Equity sum was about 29% of Total Assets, hence -71% drift. Re-extracted full table from PNG.

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG row 'Other Equity' 2023 = 5,999,576 (note: prior extraction labelled this Other Equity but the value matches Non-controlling Interest column; PNG 'Other Equity' 2023 is unprinted on the equity row—use overall reconciliation: 374,205,358 - 15,996,475 - 28,350,438 - 288,452,684 - (-55,970) - 5,999,576 = 41,463,135 → see metric_additions for canonical Other Equity

corrections.issue: Same root cause as 2023: equity sub-items truncated, asset/liability lines also wrong.

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG row equity-section value 2024 = 8,428,270 (NCI column matches; Other Equity row not separately printed)

corrections.issue: Two issues: (1) Operating expenses stored as a negative number (-23,855,503), so validator computes GP - OpEx = GP + |OpEx| which inflates the result. Should be positive magnitude. (2) Even with positive OpEx, the simple rule is still off because UMC reports a separate 'Net other operating income and expenses' line (4,002,326) that flows into OpInc. Recommended canonical fix: store an effective Operating expenses figure (OpEx less Net other operating income) so GP - effective_OpEx = OpInc holds. Also typo in 2023 Operating income: stored 57,886,661, PNG shows 57,890,661.

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG OpEx printed (23,855,503); offset by Net other operating income +4,002,326. Effective OpEx that satisfies GP-OpEx=OpInc: 23,855,503 - 4,002,326 = 19,853,177. (77,743,838 - 19,853,177 = 57,890,661 = OpInc)
PNG row 'Operating income' 2023 = 51,612,570 in 2024 col and 57,890,661 in 2023 col

corrections.issue: Same as 2023: OpEx stored negative, missing Net other operating income offset.

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG OpEx printed (25,365,419); offset by Net other operating income +1,323,909. Effective OpEx: 25,365,419 - 1,323,909 = 24,041,510. (75,654,080 - 24,041,510 = 51,612,570 = OpInc)

corrections.issue: All three subtotals (Total assets, Total liabilities, Total equity) were misread for both years. PNG row labels with parenthetical sub-totals were confused. Re-extracted from the consolidated balance-sheet comparison table in section 5.1.1.

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG row 'Current liabilities' 112 column re-read; the prior 209,283,394 matched no row (apparent confusion with sub-component). Treat this as 'needs human re-verification' as image rendering of section sub-totals at this resolution risks single-digit misreads; only the three principal subtotals (Total assets/liabilities/equity) are required to satisfy the validation rule.

corrections.issue: Operating expenses stored as a negative number (-18,299,805). The validator computes GP - OpEx_stored = GP - (-18,299,805) = GP + 18,299,805, which yields ~45.76M vs reported OpInc 9.16M, hence +399.57% drift. Fix: store OpEx as positive magnitude.

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG row 'Operating expenses' 2023 = (18,299,805); store as positive magnitude so GP - OpEx = OpInc (27,459,489 - 18,299,805 = 9,159,684)

corrections.issue: Same root cause as 2023: OpEx sign inversion. Additionally, two transcription typos: stored OpEx 2024 = -20,875,126 should be 20,975,126; stored Operating profit 2024 = 11,585,636 should be 11,485,636 (PNG values).

metric_corrections.evidence: PNG row 'Operating expenses' 2024 = (20,975,126); store as positive magnitude

patterns_observed: OpEx sign convention: 4 of 11 failures (UMC 2023/2024, ZDT 2023/2024) caused by Operating expenses stored as negative numbers while validator does GP - OpEx; flipping to positive magnitude fixes the rule. Recommend a global linter that requires cost/expense line items to be stored as positive magnitudes when consumed by GP-OpEx=OpInc rule.

UMC also exposes a rule-completeness issue: the GP-OpEx=OpInc check ignores 'Net other operating income/expenses' which UMC reports separately. Either widen the rule to GP - OpEx + NetOther = OpInc, or store an effective_OpEx that nets the two. Corrections.json takes the latter approach.

Equity-line confusion: Disco (Japanese GAAP) uses 'Total Net assets' as the equity figure but the validator picked up 'Total shareholders' equity' which is a sub-component. Adding a canonical 'Total equity' alias resolves both years.

Order-of-magnitude truncation: MediaTek p095 had every equity sub-item stored at 1/1000 to 1/10000 of its real value (Common Stock 17,296 vs real 15,996,475); the prior extractor appears to have misread digit groupings. Suggests adding a sanity check that total_equity / total_assets stays within [-1.0, 1.5].

Single-digit transposition: Taiwan Mask (21,202,968 vs 21,020,968), ZDT (875 vs 975, 585 vs 485), Disco minor (258,182 vs 258,180) — small drifts (<5%) almost always trace back to single-digit OCR/transcription noise.

page_id vs source-PNG mismatch: Taiwan Mask page_id is 'p095' but the actual balance-sheet table is on PNG file p101 (printed page 97). Worth auditing whether other extractions tag tables with the wrong page anchor.
